rows.label: qev092301_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, Himeri? Got a minute?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Certainly! What can I do for you?
Got something on your mind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Kind of. Dunno if you've heard,
but there's been a string of
BLADE disappearances lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0004
rows.name:
The third case just happened, and...an
odd commonality has emerged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0005
rows.name:
The three victims that have
disappeared so far...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0006
rows.name:
are Hans, Elliot, and Trish.
They were all regular clients
of yours, weren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0007
rows.name: Oh no![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0008
rows.name:
But yes, I suppose they did come
by for advice fairly often.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0009
rows.name:
Listen, Himeri, I want to
respect your client privilege,
but if you know anything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sorry, but I've been leaving
so much to Ornela lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0011
rows.name:
My other missions have taken
me out of the city a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Now that you mention it, I
don't see Ornela around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Yes, she was feeling under
the weather, unfortunately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0014
rows.name:
I see. Well, tell her I send
my best. And if you do hear
anything, let me know, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0015
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm sorry, but can I
ask you for a favor?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0017
rows.name:
Would you mind if we
looked into this case?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev092301_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Himeri that you're on it.

rows.label: qev092301_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev092301_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Himeri that it's not your job.

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0018
rows.name: Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hearing that people close to me are
vanishing is... It brings up memories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm afraid I wouldn't be able to
focus on much else right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0021
rows.name: R-right, of course. Sorry...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hearing that people close to me are
vanishing is... It brings up memories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm afraid I wouldn't be able to
focus on much else right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev092301_SEL0031
rows.name: Press Himeri for details of her past.

rows.label: qev092301_JNK0040
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev092301_SEL0041
rows.name:
Cheer Himeri up by assuring her
that things will work out.

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0024
rows.name:
It's not something I like
to bring up, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0025
rows.name:
I was an orphan. When I was young,
I was taken in by a church.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0026
rows.name:
The priest there was wonderful. He
became a father and a mentor to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0027
rows.name:
One day, he walked out the
door like normal and... well,
later they found him dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0028
rows.name:
I was inconsolable. I just shook,
and wept, and prayed, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0029
rows.name: And I don't think I can bear that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0030
rows.name:
That's why I want to resolve
this case as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0031
rows.name: You're always so kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0032
rows.name: It's funny...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0032_2
rows.name:
Whenever you cheer me
on like this, it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0033
rows.name:
It reminds me of when I was
living with my father.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Whenever I was sad, he'd appear
with a cup of hot cocoa in hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0035
rows.name:
Then he'd say just what
I needed to hear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0036
rows.name:
So I'm going to do whatever
it takes to solve this case.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0041
rows.name: I suppose we should ask around first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Let's see what the rumor mill says
about the folks who disappeared.[ST:wait ]
